documents.title: Ministry of Higher Education Compliance — Official
documents.summary: Omani government scholarship recipients must maintain compliance with both U.S. immigration regulations AND MoHE-specific requirements. Failure to meet MoHE obligations may result in scholarship termination, repayment demands, or restrictions on future government employment.

scope.failureImpact: Scholarship revocation, financial liability for all funds received, ban from future government employment, potential legal action in Oman

corePrinciples: Academic Excellence Principle: Maintain minimum GPA requirements
Program Stability Principle: No unauthorized program changes
Financial Accountability Principle: All funds used for approved purposes
Reporting Principle: Timely submission of all required documents
Return Service Principle: Fulfill post-completion service obligation

details: Minimum GPA: 3.0/4.0 or equivalent (B average) for graduate students; 2.5/4.0 for undergraduate
Must maintain full-time enrollment each semester (verified by DSO)
No academic probation beyond one semester without MoHE approval
All grade reports must be submitted to MoHE through official channels each term

commonViolations.text: GPA falling below minimum requirement for two consecutive terms
Failure to submit academic reports on time

mitigation: Utilize university tutoring and academic support services
Report academic difficulties to MoHE liaison early

details: Major/degree program changes require PRIOR written approval from MoHE
University transfers require 30-day advance notice and justification
Extension requests must demonstrate compelling academic/medical reasons
Early graduation must be reported within 10 days of degree conferral
controls: Submit program change requests 60 days in advance
Maintain communication with MoHE liaison officer
Document all academic decisions affecting program duration

details: Mandatory return to Oman within 60 days of program completion
Minimum 5-year employment in Omani public sector (may vary by specialization)
Failure to return triggers full scholarship repayment plus 20% penalty
Extension requests for further study require MoHE approval before current program completion

commonViolations.text: Remaining in U.S. beyond 60-day return window
Accepting private sector employment in Oman without MoHE approval

mitigation: Begin job search in Oman 6 months before graduation
Coordinate with MoHE placement office for public sector positions
Document all job applications and interviews

links.title: MoHE Scholarship Portal
links.description: Official portal for scholarship management and reporting

links.title: Omani Student Affairs - Washington DC
links.description: Embassy resources for Omani students in USA

complianceNotes: All MoHE communications must be in Arabic or formal English
Keep copies of all correspondence for minimum 5 years
Report any legal or immigration issues to MoHE within 24 hours
MoHE approval required for: marriage, childbirth, major purchases (>$5,000)
Annual physical presence verification required during summer breaks

links: Omani Ministry of Higher Education: https://www.mohe.gov.om
Embassy of Oman in Washington D.C.: https://www.omanembassy.org
